message:
fix: adapt to fsqlite-types 0.1.2 API (Arc<str>/Arc<[u8]> values, Cx type)

fsqlite-types 0.1.2 changed SqliteValue::Text from String to Arc<str>
and SqliteValue::Blob from Vec<u8> to Arc<[u8]>. The SymbolCodec trait
now takes fsqlite_types::cx::Cx instead of asupersync::Cx.

Changes:
- durability: use fsqlite_types::cx::Cx for SymbolCodec trait impls,
  add fsqlite-types dep, add cx param to bench mock codec
- ops: add .into() for String->Arc<str> in SqliteValue::Text ctors,
  replace unstable .as_str() on Arc<str> with &** deref
- fsfs: add .into() for Vec->Arc Blob values, pass cx to download_model
- storage: cargo fmt fixups from prior commit
- tests: fix quality_scores_for_indices -> quality_scores_for_hits rename

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
